summary: The team is sprinting to finalize the joint CKGSB-IE report 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global' for a September launch in Singapore, while simultaneously launching the Intelligent China program and running a split-test on Asia Start campaign routes.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the joint report with IE, which has a working title and is targeting early September completion for launch at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore. This week, Felix must create a one-pager proposal and confirm with event partners, while the team translates the Chinese report and identifies alumni case studies. Separately, the Intelligent China program website needs to go live, and its SCM campaign should start immediately to market it as a deeper alternative to Asia Start. The Asia Start campaign is in its first month running two parallel routes (AI vs. traditional) to determine which strategy to scale. Urgent items include Julie and Ira's review of the Dean's article, Joseph's translation of Prof Li Wei's FT piece and overlap check with the report, and Bin Ma's draft of the joint report. All team members should use the updated dashboard link.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, including op-eds, case studies, and launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional), reviewed results, and introduced a new in-depth program 'Intelligent China' targeting foreigners, with focus on module one in Beijing.

meetings.title: Europe-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on geopolitical tensions affecting European companies in China, with emphasis on de-risking and the role of companies versus governments.

actionItems.text: Create one-pager proposal for report structure and promotion plan
actionItems.detail: To show to president Santiago for approval.

actionItems.text: Translate bulk of Chinese report and share with team for review
Identify relevant alumni case studies from WeChat accounts for translation
actionItems.detail: To add industry perspective to the report.

actionItems.text: Confirm with Tech in Asia and Tyson about report launch at their events
actionItems.detail: Meeting with Tech in Asia tomorrow to discuss theme and launch possibility.

actionItems.text: Get website for Intelligent China program ready
actionItems.detail: Website is nearly ready and needs to be launched.

actionItems.text: Start SCM campaign for Intelligent China program
actionItems.detail: Once webpage is done, begin campaign planning and decide on route (AI or traditional).

actionItems.text: Review and provide feedback on the final version of the article on behalf of Dean, considering two comments from Ira.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: Article on Behalf of Dean
actionItems.detail: Ira sent the final article with two comments for Julie's consideration before reaching out to Shouhuo.

actionItems.text: Translate Prof Li Wei's FT Chinese article about China going global.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: 长江商学院媒体监测日报2026-6-25
actionItems.detail: Joseph volunteered to translate the article after Ira flagged it.

actionItems.text: Check overlap between Prof Li Wei's FT Chinese piece and his China Going Global report, and consider if it's worth promoting.
actionItems.meetingTitle: RE: 长江商学院媒体监测日报2026-6-25
actionItems.detail: Joseph will review the FT Chinese article for new framing or substantial differences.

actionItems.text: Review and provide feedback on the final version of the press release about Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026.
actionItems.meetingTitle: RE: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026
actionItems.detail: Joseph will review the final version after Ira's edits.

actionItems.text: Send over the draft for the joint report on Chinese companies going global with IE.
actionItems.detail: Bin Ma is working on a study about Chinese company's reverse acquisition and will send over the draft.

actionItems.text: Confirm with the Dean regarding the article on behalf of Dean after Julie's feedback.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: Article on Behalf of Dean
actionItems.detail: Ira will reach out to Shouhuo to confirm with the Dean once Julie gets back to her.

actionItems.text: Use the updated team dashboard link: https://dashboard.crmckgsb.com/
actionItems.detail: Joseph provided a corrected link for the team dashboard.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Professor Leeway and op-eds from both schools' leadership and alumni.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Target completion by early September for launch at Singapore events.
Asia Start campaign will run two routes for first month: Joseph using AI, Daisy using traditional strategy, then decide on one for rest.
Intelligent China program will be marketed as a deeper dive compared to Asia Start to avoid cannibalization.
Professor Li Wei is happy to collaborate with IE on the joint report about Chinese companies going global.
The plan for the joint report with IE is approved by Joseph and Julie.
